summary: FREE11 Comprehensive Regression Test (Iteration 31) - ALL features tested and verified. Backend: 36/36 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 28 UI scenarios pass. Razorpay, Wallet History, AdMob Rewards, Resend OTP, Firebase Push, Contest Share button, Team Builder Playing XI filter, Contest voided label - all working correctly.
action_items: INFO: Match ID 94717 now refers to ENG vs NZ (not IND vs ENG as stated in review request) - data may have changed, but Playing XI filter works correctly with 22 players
INFO: Watch & Earn shows 'Reward per ad: 10' on web (correct - 20 coins is Android TWA only)
INFO: MOCKED - Resend email delivery (dev_otp shown in response - domain not verified at resend.com)
INFO: MOCKED - Firebase push delivery (sent=false - no production firebase-service-account.json)
INFO: Razorpay in test mode (test API keys configured, create-order returns real Razorpay test orders)

features_tested.login_admin_credentials: PASS - admin@free11.com / Admin@123 logs in, redirects to /match-centre
features_tested.navbar_coins_balance: PASS - 100630 coins visible in navbar after login
features_tested.match_centre_live_upcoming_tabs: PASS - LIVE/UPCOMING/COMPLETED tabs, shows ENG vs NZ match with LIVE badge
features_tested.team_builder_playing_xi_filter: PASS - Shows 22 playing XI players (11 per team, filtered from full squad)
features_tested.team_builder_green_banner: PASS - 'Showing confirmed Playing XI only' green banner visible
features_tested.team_builder_filter_tabs: PASS - ALL(22), WK(4), BAT(6), AR(7), BOWL(5) - correct counts
features_tested.contest_hub_share_button: PASS - Green Share button (color rgb(74,222,128)) always visible in top-right of action row
features_tested.contest_hub_joined_invite_friends: PASS - 'Invite Friends' button visible on joined Head to Head contest
features_tested.contest_hub_joined_view_standing: PASS - 'View Standing' button visible on joined contests
features_tested.contest_hub_voided_label: PASS - 'Contest Voided' label in red on voided contests (Mega, Standard, Practice)
features_tested.wallet_history_page: PASS - /wallet loads with Coin History + FREE Bucks tabs
features_tested.wallet_history_coin_tab: PASS - 7 coin transactions with green(+)/red(-) color coding
features_tested.wallet_history_bucks_tab: PASS - FREE Bucks tab shows Starter Pack purchases
features_tested.watch_earn_page: PASS - /watch-earn loads with status card and daily limit info
features_tested.watch_earn_status_card: PASS - Shows 5/5 watched, 0 remaining, 10 coins per ad (web)
features_tested.profile_wallet_history_menu: PASS - 'Wallet History' menu item in Profile links to /wallet
features_tested.admob_reward_api: PASS - POST /api/v2/ads/reward credits 20 coins or 429 when daily limit reached
features_tested.push_register_api: PASS - POST /api/v2/push/register stores device token, returns registered:true
features_tested.razorpay_create_order: PASS - POST /api/razorpay/create-order creates real Razorpay order (test mode)
features_tested.otp_send_returns_sent_true: PASS - POST /api/auth/send-otp returns sent:true with dev_otp (Resend MOCKED)
features_tested.otp_wrong_otp_specific_error: PASS - POST /api/auth/verify-otp with wrong OTP returns specific error, not generic 'Registration failed'
features_tested.register_page_resend_otp_btn: PASS - Register OTP step shows 'Resend OTP' button
features_tested.register_page_dev_otp: PASS - Dev OTP displayed in OTP step (Resend MOCKED)

mocked_apis_noted: MOCKED: Resend email delivery (domain not verified - dev_otp returned in API response)
MOCKED: Firebase push delivery (sent=false - no real device token / FCM service account)
TEST MODE: Razorpay in test mode (not live payments)
seed_data_creation: OTP codes created for test emails (regression_test_31_*, regression_verify_31_*, etc.) - all expired/harmless
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive regression test (iteration 31) passed 100% backend and frontend. Key verified features: Team Builder Playing XI filter (22 players, green banner), Contest Hub (Share green button, 'Contest Voided' red label, Invite Friends + View Standing for joined contests), Wallet History (Coin + FreeBucks tabs with color-coded transactions), Watch & Earn (5/5 daily limit shown), Register Resend OTP button, Push notifications (push/register + push/send), AdMob 20 coins reward. All MOCKED integrations noted. Previous iteration 30: Firebase Push. Admin: admin@free11.com / Admin@123. Match 94717 is now ENG vs NZ (not IND vs ENG).
